# Azure Cost Optimization Skill (Minimal)

**Cost Estimation** — Reference monthly costs for key ALZ resources (Firewall, VPN, Bastion, LAW, etc.).

**Budget Alert Strategy** — 80%/100%/120% forecast thresholds with parameterized amounts per environment.

**Right-Sizing Rules** — SKU recommendations by environment tier (Dev/Test, Staging, Production).

**Cost Savings Patterns** — Dev/test pricing, auto-shutdown, reserved instances, spot VMs, storage tiering, log retention.

Read `SKILL.md` or `SKILL.digest.md` for full content.
